subject: Re:
body:
Different kind of fun.
It is fun for a short time but i am already getting sick of so many meetings!
Met your friend bill clinton yesterday followed up with sarkozy. Later in day meeting your other friend prince andrew as he has some questions re microsoft.

How are you?

boris

Sent from my AT&T Windows Mobile phone.
